operative_clauses.obligation: Right to operate at specific location using McDonald's System
Monthly percentage of Gross Sales
Minimum 4% of Gross Sales annually
No involvement in competing restaurant business
No competing business within 10 miles
20 days notice; McDonald's 10-day option to match
Transferee qualifies, assumes liability, original remains liable, royalty adjusts
17 material breach triggers (non-curable)
Workers comp + $5M CGL + lease requirements. A+/A Best rating, FSC ≥IX.
Full indemnification and hold harmless. May require defense.
Illinois law
McDonald's entitled to attorneys' fees if it prevails
Base + Pass Thru + Percentage Rent per schedule
Tenant pays all real estate taxes and assessments
Tenant responsible for all maintenance and repair
Extensive triggers: non-payment, breach of FA, abandonment, bankruptcy. Landlord may re-enter and repossess.
Present value of remaining rent over term
Double rent as liquidated damages
Landlord controls proceeds
Illinois law

exhibits_walked.why_deferred: Key operative provisions (rent, default, liquidated damages, holding over) captured from walked pages plus Item 6/17 cross-references. Remaining pages contain standard lease provisions (utilities detail, insurance detail, fixtures, recording, miscellaneous) that add procedural detail but no material economic surprises.
exhibits_walked.what_recovered_elsewhere: Rent structure from Item 6 footnotes. Default triggers from Item 17 table. Insurance from FA Section 17.
exhibits_walked.what_remains_missing: Detailed lease repair/replacement provisions (Art 6.05). Subordination/non-disturbance detail (Art 7.11). Specific condemnation allocation formulas.

operative_clauses.obligation: Must consistently meet National Franchising Standards
Year 16: apply. Year 17: recommendation. New Term Committee decides.
Continued NFS compliance, available real estate tenure, economic viability. May include reinvestment, rebuilds, relocations.
Current FA form, same royalty, new initial fee, rent per current policy
If not offered: may sell to qualified buyer who gets new term offer
Must meet all NFS. Meeting NFS is not assurance of approval.
Business Acquisition Plan required 10 days before contract. OPT financial projections required.
Experience, financial, character, full-time ability, locality, equity, conflicts. Plus FA compliance, financial screens, lending guidelines.

deferred_exhibits.reason: Variant format for non-traditional locations. Core terms similar to Exhibit B with variable term and different fee structure. Not directly walked because main economic burden is captured via Item 5/6/7 disclosures for Satellite format.
Specialized Walmart format. No initial franchise fee. Different rent structure. Not directly walked due to niche applicability.

35 pages. Key terms fully captured from Item 10 (Bank of America, SOFR+3.10%, personal/spousal guarantee, jury waiver, cross-default, OAPA). Direct clause walk would add procedural detail but no material economic changes.
